instruction:
The number of students enrolled in math courses at Portland Community College has grown over the years. The formulas
$\begin{aligned}M&=0.53x+4.8 & \qquad&& W&=0.49x+5.2\end{aligned}$ describe the numbers (of thousands) of men and women enrolled in math courses at PCC $x$ years after 2005. Give a simplified formula for the total number $T$ of thousands of students at PCC taking math classes $x$ years after 2005. Be sure to give the entire formula, starting with $T=$. [ANS]
